evidence_quotes.quote: end-of-life plan ensuring customers can continue playing their legally purchased games even after online services are shut down (e.g., via offline modes or released server software)

paragraphs.text: Please include two important consumer protections in the Digital Fairness Act: A ban on loot boxes these Mechanics resemble gambling and are particularly harmful to minors, encouraging addedictive spending behavior. A requirement for video game publishers to provide an end-of-life plan ensuring customers can continue playing their legally purchased games even after online services are shut down (e.g., via offline modes or released server software). Both measures would strengthen consumer rights, increase trust in digital products, and prevent unfair practices in the gaming industry. Thank you for your consideration.
